calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-28-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being assigned from Department 206 for commencement of short cause trial/prove-up hearing.

Dept. 514; Judge Harry Jacobs; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 01:31:48 p.m. and concluding at 01:35:12 p.m.

Plaintiff idland Credit Management, Inc. represented by Roger E. Jackson, Esq.
Defendant Marco Anton Ortiz Lara not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents an offer of proof and submits on Declaration of Jeanette Ruff in Lieu of Testimony filed Oct-25-2022.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Midland Credit Management, Inc., and against Defendant Marco Anton Ortiz Lara, as follows:

Damages: $1,445.03
Attorney fees and interest waived.

Plaintiff to file memorandum of costs within 15 days.
Costs to be determined.

Proposed judgment to be submitted.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-28-2022 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2022 Set For Trial On Nov-28-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Request Pending to Waive Court Fees and Costs Pursuant to G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, and 8.818
Off Calendar Feb-02-2022 Text Ruling
